message: It’s a house with such a spacious living room, but I wonder,
is it usually just one person living here?
Of course, there must be a housekeeper or something,
right?
Ah, no, I was just lost in the beauty of this space.
It’s nice when there are a lot of people, but when my father is away, it’s just a lonely place.
Are you usually alone?
Yes, there are live-in housekeepers and such,
but I don't really like this house.
Having too much space is actually a problem.
Is it really that interesting?
Huh, interesting in what way?
You seem to be watching everyone closely. Are you really observing us?
Ah, I tend to zone out sometimes.
That's fine, but those kinds of things can bother sensitive people.
After all, you’re a detective.
I’m sorry, I’ll be more careful from now on.
Oh, I didn’t mean it like that, so don’t worry about it.
Are you saying that just my way of looking at things makes people feel like they’re being observed?
You seem a bit flushed. Have you been drinking?
The neat outfit with a white collar and the tightly tied hair symbolizes good upbringing.
However, seeing your rich expressions, you might actually like casual clothing.
You’re not an eye-catching beauty, but you have a gentle expression.
So, everyone’s here for tonight?
Is that so? I heard something about Ted...
saying something.
Ah, he can’t make it because he has another job.
But I think it’s more than enough members for the guys, right?
Indeed, that’s true.
You’re quite straightforward, aren’t you? Hehe.
Um,
About the detective assistant thing I mentioned earlier.
Yes?
Could you seriously hire me?
Uh, um!? Th-that's a bit much.
I’m not asking for it right now. After I graduate would be fine. I’d even be okay with a low salary!
Please, can’t you find a way to hire me?
Umm.
Mmm, this is tough.
Is it possible to say that it’s a topic for after graduation?
I need an answer right now.
You have so much potential ahead of you. Yet, you want to come to someone like me now?
You’re trying to say that’s reckless, right? But it's my life, and I want to decide for myself.
Why would you want to come to someone like me?
It’s because.
It’s because.
Please! Think seriously about the assistant position.
I’m the only daughter of Martin Fabar.
I’ve already mentioned that, right?
Yeah, when you answer like that, it makes me nervous.
That’s weird. How can a detective be so delicate? With that attitude, clients will just run away.
You’re right. I’m just a guy who’s a detective in name only.
Oh, is that so?
I’m currently enrolled at Harvard. But honestly, school is boring.
Then, why not just become an actress?
Ugh, no way!
I wish you wouldn’t say things that are so unlikely.
That’s not true.
You’re charming.
If that were true, I would have become an actress already.
Looks like you’re getting used to this atmosphere.
No, not at all. I feel kind of ungrounded. Like I’m floating.
Come on, that’s so over the top.
Is there anyone you've become friends with?
When you say you've become friends,
hmm, with Guy,
and
maybe that's about it.
No way! That doesn't count as being friends to begin with.
Honestly, it's pretty hard to become close friends in such a short time, right?
That may be true, but still,
it seems like someone has taken a liking to you.
If the opportunity arises,
make sure to chat with them too.
Anyway, I’d be happy if you’re enjoying yourself.
Maybe I should quit school and become a private detective assistant.
I bet talking to someone like me is boring.
Not at all!
Hehe, you're such a kind person, I can tell.
If you have any questions, please feel free to ask.
